clue: Flecked pieces missing from jigsaw puzzle of waves
explanation: Removed flecked pieces (dotted characters) from "jigsaw" to get GSAW. GSAW puzzle (anagrammed) gives WAGS, meaning "waves".
hints: "Puzzle" tells us to shuffle around the letters in the wordplay.
The wordplay is formed from "flecked pieces missing from jigsaw".
An anagram of the remaining letters gives a synonym of "waves".
